disclaimer: Illustrative Smart Economic Execution read model only. Sample candidates — no live routing, on-chain quotes, or swap execution.

constraints.label: Civilization Benefit Constraint
constraints.rule: Civilization benefit must NEVER override execution quality.

constraints.label: Material Quality Gap
constraints.rule: Candidates materially worse for the user (execution quality gap ≥ 8) are rejected even if ecosystem benefit is higher.

constraints.label: Venue Health Floor
constraints.rule: Venue health below 50 rejects the candidate regardless of civilization benefit.

constraints.label: Illustrative Read Model
constraints.rule: All candidates are static samples — not live prices, routes, or on-chain quotes.

reasons.message: Canonical economy: MARCO on BNB Chain (LIVE).
Highest execution quality score 91 among illustrative candidates.
Civilization benefit evaluated separately — never overrides execution quality.
Execution quality 86 — within 8 points of recommended.
Execution quality 78 trails recommended 91 by 13 points — materially worse for user.
Civilization benefit 95 exceeds recommended 72 but cannot override material quality gap.
Venue health 42 below floor 50 — rejected regardless of civilization benefit (80).
Execution quality 58 trails recommended 91 by 33 points — materially worse for user.
Civilization benefit 80 exceeds recommended 72 but cannot override material quality gap.

reasons.message: Civilization Benefit Constraint: Civilization benefit must NEVER override execution quality.
Material Quality Gap: Candidates materially worse for the user (execution quality gap ≥ 8) are rejected even if ecosystem benefit is higher.
Venue Health Floor: Venue health below 50 rejects the candidate regardless of civilization benefit.
Illustrative Read Model: All candidates are static samples — not live prices, routes, or on-chain quotes.
